items.title: WMTS图层加载
items.description: 加载OGC WMTS标准服务，支持天地图、高德等瓦片服务
items.codeSnippet:
const imageryProvider = new Cesium.WebMapTileServiceImageryProvider({
  url: 'http://t0.tianditu.gov.cn/img_w/wmts',
  layer: 'img',
  style: 'default',
  format: 'tiles',
  tileMatrixSetID: 'w',
  maximumLevel: 18
})

viewer.imageryLayers.addImageryProvider(imageryProvider)

items.title: 粒子系统
items.description: 创建粒子效果，模拟火焰、烟雾、雨等
items.codeSnippet:
const particleSystem = new Cesium.ParticleSystem({
  image: 'particle.png',
  startColor: Cesium.Color.RED.withAlpha(0.7),
  endColor: Cesium.Color.YELLOW.withAlpha(0.3),
  startScale: 8,
  endScale: 2,
  minimumParticleLife: 1,
  maximumParticleLife: 3,
  minimumSpeed: 5,
  maximumSpeed: 10,
  imageSize: new Cesium.Cartesian2(20, 20),
  emissionRate: 100,
  bursts: [
    new Cesium.ParticleBurst({
      time: 0,
      minimum: 300,
      maximum: 500
    })
  ],
  lifetime: 16,
  emitter: new Cesium.CircleEmitter(2000),
  modelMatrix: Cesium.Transforms.eastNorthUpToFixedFrame(
    Cesium.Cartesian3.fromDegrees(-75.59777, 40.03883)
  ),
  emitterModelMatrix: Cesium.Matrix4.fromTranslation(
    new Cesium.Cartesian3(0.0, 0.0, 0.0)
  )
})

viewer.scene.primitives.add(particleSystem)
